chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.Transfer.Appl.No.S- 59 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.09.2019. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. for the State. = I have perused the comments of learned District & Sessions Judge, Hyderabad in terms of order dated 30.08.2019 which reflect that all the three cases against the applicant are pending before learned VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad (Ms. Shagufta Siddiqui) and she due to her ill health mostly remains on leave causing delay in proceeding with the matters. Learned Assistant Prosecutor General after going through the comments has suggested that these three cases be withdrawn from the file of learned VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad and transferred to some other Additional Sessions Judge for trial and disposal. The suggestion forwarded by learned Assistant Prosecutor General is reasonable in the given facts and circumstances. Accordingly, all the three cases viz. Sessions Case No.440/2018 (State v. Tanveer & others), Crime No.01/2018 of Police Station Tando Jam, u/s 395 PPC, Sessions Case No.441/2018 (State v. Tanveer & others), Crime No.17/2018 of Police Station Tando Jam, u/s 324 & 353 PPC and Sessions Case No.442/2018 (State v. Rasool Bux & others), Crime No.25/2018 of Police Station Tando Jam, u/s 324, 353, 147 & 148/149 PPC are ordered to be withdrawn from the file of learned VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad and transferred to learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad with direction to either himself proceed with the matters or assign the same to some other Additional Sessions Judge at Hyderabad for expeditious disposal preferably within a period of three months in accordance with law.

Tanveer & others), Crime No.17/2018 of Police Station Tando Jam, u/s 324 & 353 PPC and Sessions Case No.442/2018 (State v. Rasool Bux & others), Crime No.25/2018 of Police Station Tando Jam, u/s 324, 353, 147 & 148/149 PPC are ordered to be withdrawn from the file of learned VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad and transferred to learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad with direction to either himself proceed with the matters or assign the same to some other Additional Sessions Judge at Hyderabad for expeditious disposal preferably within a period of three months in accordance with law. Criminal transfer application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail/PA
